homeAbout.title: Official national body for swimming, water polo and distance swimming
homeAbout.text: The Swimming Federation of Macedonia works on organizing, developing and improving aquatic sports at a national level. In cooperation with clubs, coaches and expert commissions, the Federation prepares competition calendars, regulations, criteria and official record lists, as well as activities related to national team selections.
homeAbout.note: Official documents and criteria are published in the relevant sections by discipline (Swimming/Waterpolo/Distance Swimming).

stats.label: Registered clubs and active members working to develop swimming across the country.
Official national records by event, category and pool type (25m/50m).
Organization and sanctioning of national competitions, championships and cups throughout the year.

criteria.title: Swimming Criteria
criteria.subtitle: Official competition criteria, qualification standards, and national championship limits.
criteria.eligibilityText: Swimmers must meet the required standards for participation.

notes.top10: Right to participate have swimmers ranked up to 10th place.
notes.top16: Right to participate have swimmers ranked up to 16th place.

national.title: National Championship Limits
national.subtitle: Limits by pool length, gender, and age category.

nationalExtra.0: The limits are set according to the achieved results from the last National Championship (separately for 25m and 50m pool). For all disciplines and categories, the 16th best time is taken, except for the 50m and 100m freestyle where the 40th best time is taken.
nationalExtra.1: The criterion for participation in the National Championship is meeting the limit set by the National Swimming Federation of Macedonia.
nationalExtra.2: The standards apply to all registered swimmers in the Republic of Macedonia and remain valid for one year.
nationalExtra.3: Each swimmer may compete only in the discipline for the corresponding category in which they have achieved the required standard.
nationalExtra.4: A swimmer earns the right to participate if they achieve the limit in the 200m individual medley in the corresponding category, thereby gaining the right to swim 8 events prescribed by the competition regulations of the National Swimming Federation of Macedonia.
nationalExtra.5: If a swimmer achieves the required limit in a 25m pool, it will be taken into account for participation in 50m pool competitions as well, and vice versa.
